holdings.infoBox: LABD is an equity ETF with a total of 14 individual holdings. The top holdings are Dreyfus Govt Cash Man Ins stock at 45.54%, Goldman Finl Sq Trsry Inst 506 at 43.92%, Goldman Sachs Fin Gov 465 Institut at 13.64%, Cash at 7.82%, and Dreyfus Trsry Securities Cash Mgmt at 6.24%.

overview.description: The Direxion Daily S&P Biotech Bear 3X ETF (LABD) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Biotechnology Select Industry index. The fund provides daily 3 times inverse exposure to the S&P Biotechnology Select Industry Index. LABD was launched on May 28, 2015 and is issued by Direxion.
